commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 02 Jul

NYSE maintains clear dominance with the tightest metrics across all indicators: ILLIQ of 0.0013 and AR spread of 0.56%, reflecting deep institutional participation. Nasdaq 100 follows closely as the secondary liquidity hub. Conversely, London Stock Exchange ranks last despite a competitive Roll spread of 1.29%, significantly hampered by elevated ILLIQ of 0.1804—suggesting price impact concerns persist. European exchanges occupy the middle tier, with Xetra notably efficient at 0.0574 ILLIQ despite lower trading volumes.
